6b62af19.name: BLACK QUILTED PUFFER JACKET
6b62af19.description:
Black horizontal-quilted puffer jacket with stand collar and zip pockets.

Key features:
• Black outer shell with insulated warmth and weather-ready comfort.
• Full-sleeve coverage with structured silhouette.
• Quilted or padded construction for lightweight insulation.
• Secure zip closure with stand collar or hood protection.
• Functional pockets for everyday carry.
• Smart-casual outerwear suited to Nairobi cool-season dressing.

Fit & styling: Layer over tees, polos, or knitwear. Pair with denim, chinos, or tailored trousers for elevated casual and weekend style.

Care: Dry clean recommended, or machine wash cold on gentle cycle. Hang dry. Do not bleach.

Available sizes M–3XL. Exclusively at Prince Esquire.
